errors.serviceUnavailable: Unable to reach the HR Core service. Check the API URL and CORS origin.

forgotPassword.heading: Forgot password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.successTitle: Check your inbox — a reset link has been sent.
forgotPassword.successSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.

firstConnection.heading: Set your password
firstConnection.subtitle: Welcome! Create a password to activate your account.
firstConnection.newPasswordPlaceholder: Min. 8 chars, upper, lower, number, symbol
firstConnection.successMessage: Your password has been set successfully.
firstConnection.invalidLinkDescription: This link is missing a token. Please use the link from your invitation email, or ask your HR admin to resend it.

errors.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.uppercase: Must contain at least one uppercase letter.
errors.lowercase: Must contain at least one lowercase letter.
errors.number: Must contain at least one number.
errors.special: Must contain at least one special character.
errors.expiredInvite: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Ask your HR admin to resend the invite.
errors.weakPassword: Password does not meet the requirements.
errors.reuse: You cannot reuse a previous password.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

welcome.heroSubtext: Sentient HRIS combines AI with modern people management — so you spend less time on admin and more time on your team. Built for organizations that move fast.
welcome.featuresHeading: Everything HR needs, nothing it doesn't
welcome.featuresSub: Six core modules built to work together, powered by AI throughout.
welcome.testimonialsHeading: Trusted by teams who care about their people
welcome.ctaSub: Join forward-thinking HR teams already using Sentient to manage their people smarter.

featuresList.aiInsightsDesc: Predictive analytics surface workforce trends before they become problems. Know who's at risk of leaving before they decide.
featuresList.lifecycleDesc: From offer letter to offboarding, every milestone tracked in one place. Onboarding checklists, document storage, org chart — all connected.
featuresList.analyticsDesc: Headcount, attrition, leave patterns, compensation bands — live dashboards built for HR decisions, not data exports.
featuresList.complianceDesc: Built-in labor law compliance across jurisdictions. Audit trails, role-based access, and SOC 2 Type II certified.
featuresList.leaveDesc: Automated leave policies, team calendars, conflict detection, and payroll sync. No more spreadsheets.
featuresList.assistantDesc: Ask anything in plain language — headcount by department, who's on leave next week, average tenure by role. Instant answers.

ev.quote: Sentient replaced four separate tools we were using. The AI assistant alone saves our HR team two hours a day.
ev.name: Eleanor Vance

mr.quote: The leave management alone was worth the switch. No more chasing approvals over email.
mr.name: Michael Realman

sg.quote: Finally an HRIS that doesn't feel like it was built in 2005. The analytics are genuinely useful.
sg.name: Simone Garnett
